rules: Always use non-interactive mode for git commands
Use --no-verify flag for commits to skip hooks if needed
Never use interactive git commands that require user input
Use git add -A or specific file paths instead of interactive selection
NEVER automatically create commits - always ask user for confirmation first
Only prepare git add commands, let user decide when to commit
STRICTLY FORBIDDEN: Do not execute git commit without explicit user request
When task is complete, ask user if they want to commit changes
Always check terminals folder for running processes before starting pnpm dev
Use list_dir on terminals folder to see current commands
Look for existing 'pnpm dev' processes in terminal metadata
If pnpm dev is already running, do not start another instance
Kill existing processes if restart is needed
